name: Strawberry Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the angel food cake and place it in the bottom of a dish.
2. Soften the cream cheese and mix with powdered sugar.
3. Spread over the angel food cake.
4. Spread cool whip evenly over the cream cheese layer.
5. Arrange strawberries on top.
6. Mix glaze ingredients together until smooth.
7. Cook over low heat, stirring occasionally, until thickened.
8. Let cool, then pour over the strawberries.
9. Refrigerate the cake.
